violations.text: Raw animal foods (pork) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar & kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025
The floor in the walk-in cooler #1 is worn and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

At the time of inspection, ROP lobster was thawing with package intact. Reduced oxygen packaging fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment. Temperature was observed at 38 degrees Fahrenheit, see disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The ware-washing machine in the bar area was in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. PIC ordered them at time of inspeciton. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The walls in the basement area have a heavy accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The floors in the walk-in cooler #1 & walk-in freezer is worn and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025
The handwashing sink in the restroom is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

A paper towel dispenser and soap dispenser were observed installed above the warewashing sink. A sink used for food preparation or utensil washing, or a service sink may not be provided with the handwashing aids. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

At time of inspection, the following were observed in poor repair: 1) Lowboy gaskets were observed torn with missing pieces. 2) Walk-In Cooler #1 ambient temperature observed at 48F. 3) Lowboy ambient temperature observed at 46F. 4) Refrigerator #2 temperature observed at 47F. Cold holding units must be maintained at 41°F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025
Hot water is not reaching a minimum temperature of 100F, observed at 76F. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (cold drawers, 2dr freezer, soda gun machine and cheese freezer) were observed in the kitchen & basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025

The walls in the basement area have a heavy accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025
The floors in the walk-in cooler #1 & walk-in freezer is worn and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025
Inspector observed a hole with exposed wood in the wall adjacent to the prep line. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025
